sigma.title: Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets

osquery.name: t1614_001_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery.name: t1614_001_net_enum
osquery.query_text: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';

sigma_matches.title: Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 2 direct run(s), 3/3 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
